fields.name: TARGETID
fields.description: Unique DESI target identifier; primary key for joining redshift, fiber and photometry tables.

fields.name: SURVEY
fields.description: Survey phase the spectrum belongs to (sv1/sv3/main).

fields.name: Z
fields.description: Best-fit redshift from the Redrock pipeline.

fields.name: ZWARN
fields.description: Redshift quality warning bitmask; 0 = no known problems.

fields.name: SPECTYPE
fields.description: Best-fit spectral classification: GALAXY, QSO or STAR.

fields.name: DELTACHI2
fields.description: Chi-squared difference to the next-best Redrock fit; larger = more secure redshift.

fields.name: FLUX_G
fields.description: Total g-band flux from Legacy Surveys imaging (not extinction-corrected).

fields.name: FLUX_R
fields.description: Total r-band flux from Legacy Surveys imaging.

fields.name: FLUX_Z
fields.description: Total z-band flux from Legacy Surveys imaging.

fields.name: EBV
fields.description: Galactic E(B-V) reddening at the target position (SFD).

fields.name: PHOTSYS
fields.description: Imaging photometric system: N (BASS/MzLS) or S (DECaLS).

fields.name: DESI_TARGET
fields.description: Main-survey dark-time targeting bitmask (LRG bit set).
